reviewer_notes: Use Li et al. 2022 Nature Methods DOI 10.1038/s41592-022-01480-9. Independent spatial deconvolution benchmark supports cell2location as among the top-performing methods for cell type deconvolution of spots; do not claim unique best.

Already formalized as comparative interpretability evidence, not a broad downstream performance benchmark. SAE atlas supports pathway-level biological organization in scGPT representations while limiting causal-regulatory claims.
Foundation models currently lack completely neutral third-party comprehensive benchmarks. Defer forcing benchmark retrieval; rely on primary method authority with conservative wording.
Recent optimal-transport framework; third-party benchmarking is scarce. Defer benchmark and require caveat that robustness is based mostly on method-paper/self-evaluation evidence.
Waddington-OT is a task-specific mathematical framework rather than a general tool. Keep caveat: requires sufficiently time-resolved sampling and careful assumption checks.
Same formal benchmark fact as V02_BLIND_004; do not duplicate in tool_benchmarks.tsv. Use Li et al. 2022 Nature Methods DOI 10.1038/s41592-022-01480-9.
Original Perturb-seq linear-model framework. Benchmark coverage is insufficient for modern multimodal perturbation settings; avoid claims beyond the original Perturb-seq context.
